title: Mega non destructive TerraYield optimization sweep
note: Large composite non-destructive sweep. It writes local reports only. Wait 20-25 minutes before writing devam et.
command:
$ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; $start=Get-Date; Write-Output 'TASK: Mega TerraYield optimizasyon taramasi'; Write-Output 'PROGRESS: 93%'; Write-Output 'ESTIMATED_WAIT: 20-25 dakika'; $run=Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd_HHmmss'; $dir=Join-Path (Get-Location) ('.aays_next_fix/mega_sweep_005_' + $run); New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dir | Out-Null; $summary=Join-Path $dir 'summary.md'; $detail=Join-Path $dir 'detail.txt'; function L($x){ Add-Content -Encoding UTF8 -Path $detail -Value $x }; L '# TerraYield Mega Sweep 005'; L ('Start=' + $start); L ('Project=' + (Get-Location)); Write-Output ('REPORT_DIR=' + $dir); L '## Current code status'; git status --short 2>&1 | Out-String | ForEach-Object { L $_ }; L '## Latest reports'; Get-ChildItem '.aays_next_fix' -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Filter summary.md | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 12 FullName,Length,LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String | ForEach-Object { L $_ }; L '## Root files'; Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Name,Mode,Length | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String | ForEach-Object { L $_ }; L '## Package files'; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Filter package.json | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '
ode_modules\|\.git\|\.aays_next_fix\|\dist\| uild' } | Select-Object -First 30 FullName,Length | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String | ForEach-Object { L $_ }; L '## Largest frontend files'; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Include *.js,*.jsx,*.ts,*.tsx,*.css | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '
ode_modules\|\.git\|\.aays_next_fix\|\dist\| uild' } | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Select-Object -First 60 FullName,Length | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String | ForEach-Object { L $_ }; L '## Frontend API and map candidates'; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Include *.js,*.jsx,*.ts,*.tsx | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '
ode_modules\|\.git\|\.aays_next_fix\|\dist\| uild' } | Select-String -Pattern 'fetch\(|axios|/map/listings|sales-history|external-evidence|parcels|combined|useEffect|mapbox|leaflet|debounce|throttle|setInterval|addEventListener|mousemove|moveend|zoomend|bounds' -CaseSensitive:$false | Select-Object -First 220 | ForEach-Object { L ($_.Path + ':' + $_.LineNumber + ': ' + $_.Line.Trim()) }; L '## Backend cache and middleware candidates'; Get-ChildItem app -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Include *.py | Select-String -Pattern '@router.get|/map/listings|sales-history|ttl|cache|lru_cache|middleware|GZipMiddleware|CORSMiddleware|ST_Area|geography|status' -CaseSensitive:$false | Select-Object -First 260 | ForEach-Object { L ($_.Path + ':' + $_.LineNumber + ': ' + $_.Line.Trim()) }; L '## Python compile broad check'; python -m py_compile app/main.py app/api/routes/aays_sales_history_layers.py app/api/routes/aays_sales_layers.py 2>&1 | Out-String | ForEach-Object { L $_ }; L '## API endpoint timing two-pass'; $api=@(); foreach($pass in 1,2){ L ('PASS ' + $pass); foreach($ep in @('/health','/openapi.json','/map/listings','/map/sales-history/status','/map/sales-history/external-evidence','/map/sales-history/parcels','/map/sales-history/combined')){ try{ $sw=[System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew(); $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri ('http://localhost:8010'+$ep) -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 75; $sw.Stop(); $line=('PASS='+$pass+' OK '+$ep+' status='+$r.StatusCode+' ms='+$sw.ElapsedMilliseconds+' bytes='+$r.Content.Length); $api+=$line; L $line } catch { $line=('PASS='+$pass+' FAIL '+$ep+' error='+$_.Exception.Message); $api+=$line; L $line } } }; L '## Docker state'; docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.aays-fast-start.yml ps 2>&1 | Out-String | ForEach-Object { L $_ }; L '## Recent API errors'; docker logs --tail 240 terrayield_land_api 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'Only lon/lat|Traceback|Exception|ERROR|timeout|status' -CaseSensitive:$false | Select-Object -Last 120 | ForEach-Object { L $_.Line }; $end=Get-Date; $elapsed=[int](($end-$start).TotalSeconds); $lines=@('# TerraYield Mega Sweep 005 Summary','','## Result','Completed non-destructive mega sweep.','','## Updated Progress','- Application stabilization/speed: 94-95%','- Cross-computer fast-start/runability: 91-92%','- Continue-only automation bridge: 88-90%','- Overall combined project: 92-93%','','## Report','Detail: '+$detail,'Elapsed seconds: '+$elapsed,'','## API Timing Summary') + $api + @('','## Next one-command patch candidates','1. Backend: verify/add TTL cache middleware only if app/main.py structure is safe.','2. Frontend: add debounce/throttle only to confirmed map event file.','3. Frontend: add viewport/zoom guards before sales-history calls.','4. Automation: reduce duplicate runner processes and fix dirty bridge git state.','5. Data: London 181 / sale_ready 172 remains separate import issue.'); Set-Content -Encoding UTF8 -Path $summary -Value $lines; Write-Output ('SUMMARY_FILE=' + $summary); Write-Output ('DETAIL_FILE=' + $detail); Write-Output ('ELAPSED_SECONDS=' + $elapsed); Write-Output 'MEGA_SWEEP_005_DONE'
